common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to get first mile detail.

request_params.name: cursor
request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is "". If data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

children.name: shipment_method
children.description: The shipment method for bound orders, should be pickup or dropoff.

children.name: status
children.description:
The logistics status for first-mile tracking number. Status could be: NOT_AVAILABLE,ORDER_CREATED,PICKED_UP,DELIVERED,ORDER_RECEIVED,CANCELING,CANCELED.


NOT_AVAILABLE status means that either of the two scenarios has happened:

1. First Mile Tracking Number in the request does not exist. (e.g., wrong format)

2. First Mile Tracking Number is not yet bound with any order.

children.name: more
children.description: This is to indicate whether the item list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of items.

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: package_number
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order.

children.name: sls_tracking_number
children.description: The tracking number of SLS for orders/forders.

children.name: pick_up_done
children.description: Use this filed to indicate whether the order has been picked up by carrier.

children.name: arrived_transit_warehouse
children.description: Use this filed to indicate whether the order has arrived at transit warehouse.

children.name: next_cursor
children.description: If more is true, you should pass the next_cursor in the next request as cursor. The value of next_cursor will be empty string when more is false.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/first_mile/get_detail?access_token=access_token&cursor=%22%22&first_mile_tracking_number=CNF731738838434210105&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Updated the description of Status to explain NOT_AVAILABLE's meaning

value.message: The shop has no permission for first mile pre declare.
